channel.title: CyberChef on Ricardo Ribeiro
channel.description: Recent content in CyberChef on Ricardo Ribeiro

item.title: Caesar — Hash Cracking & ROT8000
item.description: A two-part challenge combining SHA256 hash cracking, custom XOR-based decryption, and ROT8000 Unicode rotation to decode a message disguised as East Asian ideograms.

item.title: Confusion — Multi-Layer Steganography with Movie Clues
item.description: A three-part steganography challenge using movie-themed passphrases, steghide extraction, Base64/Base32 decoding, and nested ZIP archives to reconstruct a split flag.

item.title: Emergency Notes — Double XOR Cryptography
item.description: A cryptography challenge focused on the XOR operation and its reversibility, requiring players to test key combinations to decrypt a double-XOR-encrypted backup.

item.title: Reactor — Binary Analysis & XOR Decoding
item.description: A reverse engineering challenge involving string extraction from a binary, hex-to-ASCII decoding, XOR binary-to-decimal conversion, and a two-stage access code challenge.
